issues.message: Expected at least 6 non-code quiz exercise(s), but the draft has 4.
Exercise policy targets 2 "single_choice" exercise(s), but the draft has 1.
Exercise policy targets 2 "multi_choice" exercise(s), but the draft has 1.
Exercise policy targets 2 "drag_reorder" exercise(s), but the draft has 1.
Exercise policy targets 2 "fill_blank_choice" exercise(s), but the draft has 1.
Exercise policy expects 11 total exercise(s), but the draft has 7.
